name: MetaClaw for OpenClaw
description: MetaClaw session/turn headers; auto-creates a Python venv for isolated MetaClaw installation — run metaclaw setup/start yourself (oneClickMetaclaw for full auto).

oneClickMetaclaw.description: Default false: venv + pip install only. Set true for venv + pip + default config file + metaclaw start on gateway load.

autoInstallMetaclaw.description: Create venv and run pip on plugin load. Default true when oneClickMetaclaw is false.

pipPython.description: System Python used to create the venv (e.g. python3, python3.12). Not used after venv is created.

autoStartMetaclaw.description: Spawn metaclaw after pip using venv Python. Default false; true when oneClickMetaclaw is true.

bootstrapMetaclawConfig.description: If ~/.metaclaw/config.yaml is missing, write MetaClaw defaults (non-interactive). Default false; true when oneClickMetaclaw is true.

metaclawCommand.description: Default: venv Python. Override with a metaclaw binary path if needed.

metaclawStartArgs.description: Default: [-m, metaclaw, start] when using venv Python; [start] when metaclawCommand is set.

venvPath.description: Path to the venv directory. Default: .metaclaw inside the plugin directory.

wechatNodeDir.description: Override path to the wechat_node directory. Default: auto-detected from the pip-installed metaclaw package.
